ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gene_sets" (
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene set */,
  "gene_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene set */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism to which the gene set belongs (e.g. Homo sapiens) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene set was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicate if the gene set is public or private */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the gene set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome location of the gene */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (e.g., +, -) */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pathway */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism to which the pathway belongs (e.g. Homo sapiens) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pathway was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pathway was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicate if the pathway is public or private */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_set_pathway" (
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway */,
  "overlap" TEXT /* Overlap between the gene set and the pathway */,
  "adjusted_p_value" REAL /* Adjusted p-value of the overlap */,
  "combined_score" REAL /* Combined score of the overlap */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_set_id", "pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_set_genes" (
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_set_id", "gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_genes" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id", "gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set used in the analysis */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway used in the analysis */,
  "adjusted_p_value" REAL /* Adjusted p-value of the result */,
  "combined_score" REAL /* Combined score of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis result was last updated */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_gene_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_id") REFERENCES gene_sets ("gene_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result to which the parameter belongs */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_parameters_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id")
)
